title: stenurus tenuifolium
intro: Stenurus tenuifolium, also known as Chinese Angelica, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of China. It is a member of the carrot family and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stenurus tenuifolium include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Stenurus tenuifolium is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote digestion and alleviate menstrual cramps.
